task: Review the flow and determine whether the primary task can be completed clearly and confidently.
frictionPoints: The grid layout of cards may cause navigation issues for screen-reader-reliant users without clear grouping or separator elements.
Similar button labels (e.g., 'Go to Builder' and 'Subscribe') across different plans may cause confusion.
confusionPoints: The meaning of 'Go to Builder' vs 'Subscribe' can be inferred but may not be immediately clear without additional context or visual cues.
recommendations: Provide clear and distinct labels for each card to facilitate easy navigation and understanding of plan differences.
Implement ARIA attributes or other accessibility features to ensure screen readers can effectively convey the structure and purpose of each card and button.
